label: Ordered take group
description: Defines a named group that limits how many items of this kind a pawn may pick up at once. Things reference a group via their orderedTakeGroup field.

max.label: Max
max.description: Maximum number of items belonging to this group that a pawn may pick up in a single ordered-take action. Must be greater than zero.

new-ordered-take-group.label: New ordered take group
new-ordered-take-group.description: Minimal ordered take group with a def name, label, and pickup limit.
